name: TTV3
short_description: TTV3 is the third volume of the retro hardcore maze wanderer minigame series Trip to Vinelands
detailed_description:
TTV3 is the third volume of the retro hardcore maze wanderer minigame series Trip to Vinelands
Exit the screen avoiding vines, blades, and spikes.
Made by the same developer of the arcade series UBERMOSH, TTV3 brings a reflex-based challenge with original audio and art.
about_the_game:
TTV3 is the third volume of the retro hardcore maze wanderer minigame series Trip to Vinelands
Exit the screen avoiding vines, blades, and spikes.
Made by the same developer of the arcade series UBERMOSH, TTV3 brings a reflex-based challenge with original audio and art.
